Name: CHR_WET_PARAM
Description: Defines how wetness fades and dries over time on character materials, including separate behavior for standard and metallic surfaces.

Fields.Name: Drying Rate (Standard)
Fields.Description: Rate at which wetness decreases on non-metallic surfaces.

Fields.Name: Drying Rate (Metal)
Fields.Description: Rate at which wetness decreases on metallic surfaces.

Fields.Name: Wetness Type
Fields.Description: Selects the wetness behavior or configuration preset applied to the character.

Fields.Name: Drying Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Determines how wetness transitions back to a dry state over time.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Unused field reserved for future expansion.
